title: ISectionProfile
description: ISectionProfile: I-shaped profile with parallel flanges with equal thickness.

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Width.description: Full width of both flanges between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

FlangeThickness.description: Thickness of both flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

RootRadius.description: Fillet radius between inner face of the flanges and faces of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

ToeRadius.description: Fillet radius at the end of the flanges. Value need to be smaller or equal than the flange thickness. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
